```
<head><link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.5.1/css/all.min.css"/><script type="module">document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',()=>{const e=document.getElementById('raw-data');if(!e)return;const t=e.innerHTML.trim(),n=(e,t)=>{const n=new RegExp(`<${t}>([\\s\\S]*?)</${t}>`),a=e.match(n);return a?a[1].trim():null},a=e=>{if(!e)return!1;const t=e.trim().toLowerCase();return''!==t&&'无'!==t&&'none'!==t&&'null'!==t},r=n(t,'live_name'),o=n(t,'live_picture'),c=n(t,'live_paidbarrage'),l=((e,t)=>{const n=new RegExp(`<${t}(\\d*)>([\\s\\S]*?)</${t}\\1>`,'g'),a=[];let r;for(;null!==(r=n.exec(e));){const e=r[2].trim();e&&a.push(e)}return a})(t,'live_barrage'),s=document.querySelector('.live-title');s&&(a(r)?s.textContent=r:s.textContent='直播间');const i=document.querySelector('.live-screen span'),d=document.querySelector('.live-screen');d&&i&&(a(o)?i.textContent=o:d.style.display='none');const m=document.querySelector('.barrage-area');if(m&&(l.forEach((e,t)=>{if(!a(e))return;const n=document.createElement('div');n.className='barrage-item',n.textContent=e,n.style.animationDelay=.1*(t+1)+'s',m.appendChild(n)}),a(c))){const e=c.lastIndexOf(':'),t=c.lastIndexOf('：'),n=Math.max(e,t);let r=c,o=null;if(n>0&&(r=c.substring(0,n).trim(),o=c.substring(n+1).trim()),a(r)){const e=document.createElement('div');e.className='paid-barrage-item',e.style.animationDelay=.1*(l.length+1)+'s';const t=document.createElement('span');if(t.className='sc-icon',t.textContent='💰',e.appendChild(t),e.appendChild(document.createTextNode(r)),a(o)){const t=document.createElement('span');t.className='paid-amount',t.textContent='¥'+o,e.appendChild(t)}m.appendChild(e)}}});
//# sourceMappingURL=index.js.map</script><style>@keyframes fadeIn{from{opacity:0;transform:scale(0.98) translateY(10px)}to{opacity:1;transform:scale(1) translateY(0)}}@keyframes slideInUp{from{transform:translateY(100%);opacity:0}to{transform:translateY(0);opacity:1}}@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{transform:scale(1);box-shadow:0 0 15px rgba(255,107,129,0.4)}50%{transform:scale(1.05);box-shadow:0 0 25px rgba(255,107,129,0.7)}}body{background-color:transparent;font-family:-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',Roboto,'Helvetica Neue',Arial,sans-serif;margin:0;padding:0}.live-room-container{background:linear-gradient(145deg,#1e1e2f,#27293d);border-radius:20px;box-shadow:0 10px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);overflow:hidden;color:#e0e0e0;margin:15px;animation:fadeIn 0.7s cubic-bezier(0.25,0.46,0.45,0.94) both;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);display:flex;flex-direction:column}.live-header{padding:15px 20px;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.2);display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);flex-shrink:0}.live-title{font-size:1.3em;font-weight:700;color:#ffffff;text-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(255,107,129,0.5)}.live-status{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-size:0.9em;color:#ff6b81}.live-status .live-indicator{width:10px;height:10px;background-color:#ff6b81;border-radius:50%;animation:pulse 1.5s infinite}.live-screen{background:rgba(0,0,0,0.25);padding:20px;margin:20px 20px 0 i{margin-right:10px;color:#ff6b81}.barrage-area{padding:20px;flex-grow:1;min-height:250px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:flex-end;gap:12px;background:transparent}.barrage-item,.paid-barrage-item{padding:8px both}.barrage-item{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.1);color:#dcdcdc;align-self:flex-start}.paid-barrage-item{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#ff6b81,#ff8c9a);color:#ffffff;font-weight:bold;align-self:center;border:2px ```
```
